version_description: The live version from Laneway 2025. YouTube link: https: //www.youtube.com/watch?v=Ec08db2hP10.

performance.name: Laneway 2025
performance.comment: I believe this is the first live performance in this key- but do correct me if I'm wrong!

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Chords:
[ch]C[/ch]      332010
[ch]Cmaj7[/ch]  332000
[ch]Am[/ch]     002210
[ch]G[/ch]      320033
[ch]Fmaj7[/ch]  xx3210
[ch]Am7[/ch]    002010
[ch]Dm[/ch]     xx0231
[ch]G/E[/ch]    020033

[Intro]
N.C.

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
 Just one more tear to cry[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Am[/ch]
One teardrop from my eye (yuh)[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]
You better save it for[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
 The middle of the night[/tab]
[tab]                            [ch]Am[/ch]
When things aren't black-and-white[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]Dm[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]     N.C.
 Enter, Troubadour:'Remember 24?'[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
 And when I'm back in Chicago, I feel it[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
Another version of me, I was in it[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
I wave goodbye to the end of beginning[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
 This song has started now[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]Am[/ch]
And you're just finding out (ha)[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]
Now isn't that a laugh?[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                       [ch]Am7[/ch]
 A major sacrifice, but clueless at the time[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]
 Enter, Caroline: "Just trust me, you'll be fine"[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
 And when I'm back in Chicago, I feel it[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
Another version of me, I was in it[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
I wave goodbye to the end of beginning[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
(Goodbye, goodbye)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
(Goodbye, goodbye)[/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                            [ch]Am[/ch]
 You take the man out of the city, not the city out the man[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                            [ch]Am[/ch]
 You take the man out of the city, not the city out the man[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                            [ch]Am[/ch]
 You take the man out of the city, not the city out the man[/tab]
N.C.                       *
You take the man out of the


[Chorus]
[tab]              [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]*
 And when I'm back in Chicago, I feel it[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]G/E[/ch]   [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
Another version of me, I was in it[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
Oh, I wave goodbye to the end of beginning[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
(Goodbye, goodbye)[/tab]


[Outro]

|[ch]Fmaj7[/ch]|    |
|[ch]C[/ch]    |[ch]G[/ch]   |[ch]Fmaj7[/ch]|    |
|[ch]Am[/ch]   |[ch]G[/ch]   |[ch]Fmaj7[/ch]|    |
|[ch]C[/ch]    |[ch]G[/ch]   |[ch]Fmaj7[/ch]|    |
